```ruby
def solve(s)
    n = s.length
    prefix_L = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    prefix_C = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    (0...n).each do |i|
        prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] == 'L' ? 1 : 0)
        prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] == 'C' ? 1 : 0)
    end
    suffix_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    (n-1).downto(0) do |i|
        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
    end
    original_count = 0
    (0...n).each do |j|
        if s[j] == 'C'
            original_count += prefix_L[j] * suffix_T[j+1]
        end
    end
    sum_C_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    (n-1).downto(0) do |i|
        if s[i] == 'C'
            sum_C_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + sum_C_T[i+1]
        else
            sum_C_T[i] = sum_C_T[i+1]
        end
    end
    max_L = 0
    (0...n+1).each do |i|
        max_L = [max_L, sum_C_T[i]].max
    end
    max_C = 0
    (0...n+1).each do |i|
        l = prefix_L[i]
        t = suffix_T[i+1]
        max_C = [max_C, l * t].max
    end
    max_T = 0
    (0...n+1).each do |i|
        l = prefix_L[i]
        c = prefix_C[i]
        max_T = [max_T, l * c].max
    end
    max_added = [max_L, max_C, max_T].max
    original_count + max_added
end
```

        prefix_L[i + 1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] === 'L' ? 1 : 0);
        prefix_C[i + 1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] === 'C' ? 1 : 0);
    }
    const suffix_T = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);
    for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i + 1] + (s[i] === 'T' ? 1 : 0);
    }
    let original_count = 0;
    for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) {
        if (s[j] === 'C') {
            original_count += prefix_L[j] * suffix_T[j + 1];
        }

    const sum_C_T = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

    let max_L = 0;

        max_T = Math.max(max_T, l * c);
    }
    const max_added = Math.max(max_L, max_C, max_T);
    return original_count + max_added;
}

```ruby
def solve(s)
    n = s.length
    prefix_L = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    prefix_C = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    (0...n).each do |i|
        prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] == 'L' ? 1 : 0)
        prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] == 'C' ? 1 : 0)
    end
    suffix_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    (n-1).downto(0) do |i|
        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
    end
    original_count = 0
    (0...n).each do |j|
        if s[j] == 'C'
            original_count += prefix_L[j] * suffix_T[j+1]
        end
    end
    sum_C_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    (n-1).downto(0) do |i|
        if s[i] == 'C'
            sum_C_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + sum_C_T[i+1]
        else
            sum_C_T[i] = sum_C_T[i+1]
        end
    end
    max_L = 0
    (0...n+1).each do |i|
        max_L = [max_L, sum_C_T[i]].max
    end
    max_C = 0
    (0...n+1).each do |i|
        l = prefix_L[i]
        t = suffix_T[i+1]
        max_C = [max_C, l * t].max
    end
    max_T = 0
    (0...n+1).each do |i|
        l = prefix_L[i]
        c = prefix_C[i]
        max_T = [max_T, l * c].max
    end
    max_added = [max_L, max_C, max_T].max
    original_count + max_added
end
```

```ruby
def solve(s)
    n = s.length
    prefix_L = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    prefix_C = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    (0...n).each do |i|
        prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] == 'L' ? 1 : 0)
        prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] == 'C' ? 1 : 0)
    end
    suffix_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    (n-1).downto(0) do |i|
        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
    end
    original_count = 0
    (0...n).each do |j|
        if s[j] == 'C'
            original_count += prefix_L[j] * suffix_T[j+1]
        end
    end
    sum_C_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    (n-1).downto(0) do |i|
        if s[i] == 'C'
            sum_C_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + sum_C_T[i+1]
        else
            sum_C_T[i] = sum_C_T[i+1]
        end
    end
    max_L = 0
    (0..n).each do |i|
        max_L = [max_L, sum_C_T[i]].max
    end
    max_C = 0
    (0..n).each do |i|
        l = prefix_L[i]
        t = suffix_T[i+1]
        max_C = [max_C, l * t].max
    end
    max_T = 0
    (0..n).each do |i|
        l = prefix_L[i]
        c = prefix_C[i]
        max_T = [max_T, l * c].max
    end
    max_added = [max_L, max_C, max_T].max
    original_count + max_added
end
```

function solve(s) {

    const n = s.length;

    // Compute prefix_L and prefix_C.

    const prefix_L = new Array(n+1).fill(0);

    const prefix_C = new Array(n+1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] === 'L' ? 1 : 0);

        prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] === 'C' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Compute suffix_T.

    const suffix_T = new Array(n+1).fill(0);

    for (let i = n-1; i >= 0; i--) {

        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] === 'T' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Compute original_count.

    let original_count = 0;

    for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) {

        if (s[j] === 'C') {

            original_count += prefix_L[j] * suffix_T[j+1];

        }

    }

    // Compute sum_C_T.

    const sum_C_T = new Array(n+1).fill(0);

    for (let i = n-1; i >= 0; i--) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            sum_C_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + sum_C_T[i+1];

        } else {

            sum_C_T[i] = sum_C_T[i+1];

        }

    }

    // Now compute the maximum added by inserting 'L', 'C', 'T'.

    let max_L = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        max_L = Math.max(max_L, sum_C_T[i]);

    }

    let max_C = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        const l = prefix_L[i];

        const t = suffix_T[i+1];

        max_C = Math.max(max_C, l * t);

    }

    let max_T = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        const l = prefix_L[i];

        const c = prefix_C[i];

        max_T = Math.max(max_T, l * c);

    }

    const max_added = Math.max(max_L, max_C, max_T);

    return original_count + max_added;

}

```ruby
def solve(s)
    n = s.length
    prefix_L = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    prefix_C = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    for i in 0...n
        prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] == 'L' ? 1 : 0)
        prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] == 'C' ? 1 : 0)
    end

    suffix_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    for i in (n-1).downto(0)
        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
    end

    t_after_c = Array.new(n, 0)
    for i in 0...n
        t_after_c[i] = (s[i] == 'C') ? suffix_T[i+1] : 0
    end

    sum_t_after_c_suffix = Array.new(n + 2, 0)
    for i in (n-1).downto(0)
        sum_t_after_c_suffix[i] = t_after_c[i] + sum_t_after_c_suffix[i+1]
    end

    max_L_insert = 0
    for i in 0...n
        max_L_insert = [max_L_insert, sum_t_after_c_suffix[i]].max
    end

    max_C_insert = 0
    for i in 0...n
        current = prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i]
        max_C_insert = [max_C_insert, current].max
    end

    max_T_insert = 0
    for i in 0...n
        current = prefix_L[i] * prefix_C[i]
        max_T_insert = [max_T_insert, current].max
    end

    original_count = 0
    for j in 0...n
        if s[j] == 'C'
            original_count += prefix_L[j] * suffix_T[j+1]
        end
    end

    max_added = [max_L_insert, max_C_insert, max_T_insert].max
    original_count + max_added
end
```

    # Compute suffix_T

    for i in (n-1).downto(0)
        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
    end

    # Compute t_after_c array

    for i in 0...n
        if s[i] == 'C'
            t_after_c[i] = suffix_T[i+1]
        else

        end
    end

    # Compute sum_t_after_c_suffix
    sum_t_after_c_suffix = Array.new(n + 2, 0)
    for i in (n-1).downto(0)
        sum_t_after_c_suffix[i] = t_after_c[i] + sum_t_after_c_suffix[i+1]

    # Compute max_L_insert

    end

    # Compute the maximum added
    max_added = [max_L_insert, max_C_insert, max_T_insert].max

    # Return original_count + max_added
    original_count + max_added
end

def solve(s)
    n = s.length
    prefix_L = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    prefix_C = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    for i in 0...n
        prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] == 'L' ? 1 : 0)
        prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] == 'C' ? 1 : 0)
    end
    suffix_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    for i in (n-1).downto(0)
        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
    end
    original_count = 0
    for j in 0...n
        if s[j] == 'C'
            original_count += prefix_L[j] * suffix_T[j+1]
        end
    end
```ruby
    sum_C_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    for i in (n-1).downto(0)
        if s[i] == 'C'
            sum_C_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + sum_C_T[i+1]
        else
            sum_C_T[i] = sum_C_T[i+1]
        end
    end
    max_L = sum_C_T.max
    max_C = 0
    for i in 0..n
        current_L = prefix_L[i]
        current_T = suffix_T[i+1]
        max_C = [max_C, current_L * current_T].max
    end
    max_T = 0
    for i in 0..n
        current_L = prefix_L[i]
        current_C = prefix_C[i]
        max_T = [max_T, current_L * current_C].max
    end
```
    return original_count + [max_L, max_C, max_T].max
end

```ruby
def solve(s)
    n = s.length
    prefix_L = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    prefix_C = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    for i in 0...n
        prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] == 'L' ? 1 : 0)
        prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] == 'C' ? 1 : 0)
    end
    suffix_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    for i in (n-1).downto(0)
        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
    end
    original_count = 0
    for j in 0...n
        if s[j] == 'C'
            original_count += prefix_L[j] * suffix_T[j+1]
        end
    end
    sum_C_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    for i in (n-1).downto(0)
        if s[i] == 'C'
            sum_C_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + sum_C_T[i+1]
        else
            sum_C_T[i] = sum_C_T[i+1]
        end
    end
    max_L = sum_C_T.max
    max_C = 0
    for i in 0..n
        current_L = prefix_L[i]
        current_T = suffix_T[i+1]
        max_C = [max_C, current_L * current_T].max
    end
    max_T = 0
    for i in 0..n
        current_L = prefix_L[i]
        current_C = prefix_C[i]
        max_T = [max_T, current_L * current_C].max
    end
    original_count + [max_L, max_C, max_T].max
end
```

**子序列** 是从另一个字符串中删除某些字符（可以不删除）且不改变剩余字符顺序后得到的一个 **非空** 字符串。

 

**示例 1：**

**输入：** s = "LMCT"

**输出：** 2

**解释：**

可以在字符串 `s` 的开头插入一个 `"L"`，变为 `"LLMCT"`，其中包含 2 个子序列，分别位于下标 [0, 3, 4] 和 [1, 3, 4]。

**示例 2：**

**输入：** s = "LCCT"

**输出：** 4

**解释：**

可以在字符串 `s` 的开头插入一个 `"L"`，变为 `"LLCCT"`，其中包含 4 个子序列，分别位于下标 [0, 2, 4]、[0, 3, 4]、[1, 2, 4] 和 [1, 3, 4]。

**示例 3：**

**输入：** s = "L"

**输出：** 0

**解释：**

插入一个字母无法获得子序列 `"LCT"`，结果为 0。

 

**提示：**

- `1 <= s.length <= 105`
- `s` 仅由大写英文字母组成。

function solve(s) {

    const n = s.length;

    // Compute prefix_L and prefix_C.

    const prefix_L = new Array(n+1).fill(0);

    const prefix_C = new Array(n+1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] === 'L' ? 1 : 0);

        prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] === 'C' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Compute suffix_T.

    const suffix_T = new Array(n+1).fill(0);

    for (let i = n-1; i >= 0; i--) {

        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] === 'T' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Compute original_count.

    let original_count = 0;

    for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) {

        if (s[j] === 'C') {

            original_count += prefix_L[j] * suffix_T[j+1];

        }

    }

    // Compute sum_C_T.

    const sum_C_T = new Array(n+1).fill(0);

    for (let i = n-1; i >= 0; i--) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            sum_C_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + sum_C_T[i+1];

        } else {

            sum_C_T[i] = sum_C_T[i+1];

        }

    }

    // Now compute the maximum added by inserting 'L', 'C', 'T'.

    let max_L = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        max_L = Math.max(max_L, sum_C_T[i]);

    }

    let max_C = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        const l = prefix_L[i];

        const t = suffix_T[i+1];

        max_C = Math.max(max_C, l * t);

    }

    let max_T = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        const l = prefix_L[i];

        const c = prefix_C[i];

        max_T = Math.max(max_T, l * c);

    }

    const max_added = Math.max(max_L, max_C, max_T);

    return original_count + max_added;

}

Now, the code should be written in JavaScript, with the function solve(s).

But in JavaScript, the code would be:

function solve(s) {
    const n = s.length;
    const prefix_L = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);
    const prefix_C = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);
    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        prefix_L[i + 1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] === 'L' ? 1 : 0);
        prefix_C[i + 1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] === 'C' ? 1 : 0);
    }
    const suffix_T = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);
    for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i + 1] + (s[i] === 'T' ? 1 : 0);
    }
    let original_count = 0;
    for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) {
        if (s[j] === 'C') {
            original_count += prefix_L[j] * suffix_T[j + 1];
        }
    }
    const sum_C_T = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);
    for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        if (s[i] === 'C') {
            sum_C_T[i] = suffix_T[i + 1] + sum_C_T[i + 1];
        } else {
            sum_C_T[i] = sum_C_T[i + 1];
        }
    }
    let max_L = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {
        max_L = Math.max(max_L, sum_C_T[i]);
    }
    let max_C = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {
        const l = prefix_L[i];
        const t = suffix_T[i + 1];
        max_C = Math.max(max_C, l * t);
    }
    let max_T = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {
        const l = prefix_L[i];
        const c = prefix_C[i];
        max_T = Math.max(max_T, l * c);
    }
    const max_added = Math.max(max_L, max_C, max_T);
    return original_count + max_added;
}
